proved: zero or greater-than-ten-minute timeout controls fail before transport
a fake provider delayed before response headers produces a distinct sanitized timeout
a fake provider stalled after headers and a partial body produces a distinct sanitized timeout
a caller can cancel an in-flight request after the fake provider receives it
repeated cancellation is idempotent and produces a distinct sanitized cancelled result
the request remains disclosure-gated, HTTPS-or-literal-loopback only, storage-off, size-bounded, normalized, and secret-redacted
notProved: live network SSE event dispatch, backpressure, or cancellation between normalized events
retry-after, reconnect, or duplicate event semantics
product credential integration or typed frontend disclosure acceptance
a live OpenAI request or any model-quality property
Anthropic, Gemini, xAI, or custom provider controls
